channel.title: GitHub TSQL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of TSQL in GitHub

item.title: lerocha/chinook-database
item.description: Sample database for SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, DB2

item.title: BrentOzarULTD/SQL-Server-First-Responder-Kit
item.description: sp_Blitz, sp_BlitzCache, sp_BlitzFirst, sp_BlitzIndex, and other SQL Server scripts for health checks and performance tuning.

item.description: The code repository for the VS Code Live Keynote demo

item.title: Azure-Samples/dab-library-demo-containers
item.description: Build your APIs with DAB using containers to get an isolated, and lightweight local development experience.

item.title: LinkedInLearning/top-5-things-to-know-in-advanced-sql-4403486
item.description: This is a code repository for the LinkedIn Learning course Top 5 Things to Know in Advanced SQL.
